case_title: KWAN, CURRAN vs. WEBER, MARK et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT WEBER, MARK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEBER, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1630 46TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,095.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,095.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION & EVICTION STAYED IF DEFT MAKES PMTS TO PLTF ACC'D TO SCHEDULE; SEE STIP. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS/ATNYS FEES. DEFT'S $500 SEC DEPOSIT ACCOUNTED FOR ACC'D TO LAW. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLTF MAY APPLY BY DECLARATION TO LIFT STAY TO SEEK POSSESSION & UNPAID JUDGMNT AS DETAILED IN STIP.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF KWAN, CURRAN
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
